description: In-flight alpha track: explicit avatar-level RBAC for DApp economies. Ordinary avatars can use/run DApps; DApp developers can author with dapp:develop; DApp managers can manage DApp lifecycle/membership with dapp:manage; platform operators remain JWT-only operator:admin. Tightens DApp policies so logged-in JWT avatars are not implicitly DApp authors and API-key DApp scopes remain bounded by the owning avatar's current role.
